hero_subtitle: SFTY structures data retention workflows that preserve audit evidence, enforce role-based access, and support institutional compliance for regulated digital asset businesses.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Data retention policies slow institutional workflows
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to enforce retention requirements across fragmented systems and inconsistent access controls. This creates gaps in audit readiness and weakens evidence integrity for trusted institutional oversight.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY centralizes data retention rules, linking access permissions, audit logs and evidence preservation into one operational layer that enforces policies consistently across fragmented systems for institutional compliance.
workflow_title: From retention policy to audit evidence
workflow_description: SFTY translates data retention policies into controlled workflows that preserve evidence integrity, manage access permissions, and support audit-ready compliance operations.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented retention. Secure operational control
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects data retention policies to workflows, preserving audit-ready evidence, managing access and supporting consistent control for institutional compliance and regulatory readiness.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports regulated VASPs in transforming retention policies into audit-ready workflows with secure evidence, provider coordination, bank due diligence and enterprise-grade deployment control.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support retention policy workflows for VASPs
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how retention policies integrate into compliance workflows
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit logs preserve evidence for data retention
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe role-based access controls for secure data retention
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VASPs managing retention?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides VASPs a compliance layer that structures data retention policies into auditable workflows with role-based access, evidence integrity, and secure data governance for regulated operational readiness.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY structure retention workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY supports operational retention by routing data through controlled workflows, applying policy rules, managing evidence custody and enabling clear retention decision logs.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves audit evidence through decision logs, case histories and evidence packages that support review readiness and chain-of-custody documentation for compliance inspections.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: SFTY connects to diverse onboarding, KYT, Travel Rule, and screening tools, layering retention management atop existing providers without disrupting current compliance operations or toolsets.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace retention or compliance providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above retention and compliance providers, coordinating their outputs into structured workflows without replacing underlying data storage or compliance systems.
final_title: Turn data retention policies into controlled workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY supports structured data retention, audit evidence preservation, role-based access and compliance for regulated VASPs.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
